messages.preview: Shout out to my mum on her birthday!
messages.fullMessage: Shout out to my mum on her birthday! She loves Capital FM and listens every morning. Happy Birthday Mama!

messages.preview: Please read this on air for my family...
messages.fullMessage: Please read this on air for my family in Kampala. We send our greetings to all listeners and thank Radio Uganda for the great service.

messages.preview: Good morning Ghana! Keep up the great work
messages.fullMessage: Good morning Ghana! Keep up the great work Joy FM team. Your breakfast show brightens my mornings every day. God bless you all.

messages.preview: Play something by Diamond Platnumz please!
messages.fullMessage: Play something by Diamond Platnumz please! He is the best artist in East Africa and we love his music on your station.

messages.preview: Requesting a dedication for my wife...
messages.fullMessage: Requesting a dedication for my wife on our anniversary. Please play our favourite song and send her love from me.

messages.preview: Thank you for the amazing gospel programming
messages.fullMessage: Thank you for the amazing gospel programming this week. It has really touched my heart and given me strength to face the new week.

messages.preview: Traffic is very bad on Thika Road today...
messages.fullMessage: Traffic is very bad on Thika Road today near the Roysambu junction. Please warn other listeners to take alternative routes.

messages.preview: Great coverage of the sports event last night
messages.fullMessage: Great coverage of the sports event last night. Your reporters did an excellent job and I watched the entire show. Well done NTV Uganda!

messages.preview: I agree with the previous caller about...
messages.fullMessage: I agree with the previous caller about the state of the roads in Accra. The government needs to do more to fix the infrastructure.

messages.preview: Request: Bongo Flava mix this evening please!
messages.fullMessage: Request: Bongo Flava mix this evening please! We want to hear the latest hits from Tanzania. Your station is the best!

messages.preview: Good morning from Nairobi! Love the show
messages.fullMessage: Good morning from Nairobi! Love the show as always. You guys make my commute so much better. Keep playing great music!

messages.preview: Can you play some Ugandan gospel music?
messages.fullMessage: Can you play some Ugandan gospel music? We love hearing local artists praise the Lord. God bless Radio Uganda!

messages.preview: Lagos traffic is terrible this morning
messages.fullMessage: Lagos traffic is terrible this morning. I've been stuck on Third Mainland Bridge for over an hour. Any updates on alternate routes?

messages.preview: Thank you for covering the community event
messages.fullMessage: Thank you for covering the community event in Kigali yesterday. It was wonderful to see local heroes recognized on air.

messages.preview: Please play some old school R&B
messages.fullMessage: Please play some old school R&B before I head to work. Something from the 90s would be perfect. Love Metro FM!

messages.preview: Blessings to Peace FM team this morning
messages.fullMessage: Blessings to Peace FM team this morning. Your religious programming starts my day with peace and gratitude. Thank you!

messages.preview: Can you shout out my name on air?
messages.fullMessage: Can you shout out my name on air? My name is Amina from Dar es Salaam. I'm a big fan of Hot 96 and listen every morning!

messages.preview: The midnight show was incredible last night
messages.fullMessage: The midnight show was incredible last night! The DJ played all my favourite tracks. Please keep up the amazing work Star FM!

messages.preview: Late night listener from Mombasa here!
messages.fullMessage: Late night listener from Mombasa here! I tune in every night before bed. Capital FM is the best station in Kenya, hands down!

messages.preview: Thank you for the overnight music mix
messages.fullMessage: Thank you for the overnight music mix. It helps me stay awake while working night shifts at the hospital. God bless you all!

messages.preview: Playing great tunes at 4am!
messages.fullMessage: Playing great tunes at 4am! You guys never sleep. Joy FM is always there for us night owls. Keep the music flowing!

messages.preview: Bongo Flava all night long!
messages.fullMessage: Bongo Flava all night long! This is exactly what I needed. Hot 96 knows how to keep the vibes going. Asante sana!

messages.preview: Afrobeats playlist is fire tonight
messages.fullMessage: Afrobeats playlist is fire tonight! Who is the DJ? Please share the playlist on social media. We need to save these tracks!

messages.preview: Peaceful music for the late hours
messages.fullMessage: Peaceful music for the late hours. Radio Rwanda always provides calming content. Thank you for being there for us.

messages.preview: Nairobi nightlife update please!
messages.fullMessage: Nairobi nightlife update please! What's happening in the city tonight? Metro FM always has the best info on events.
